task_completion.description: EdrawMax application is opened and a new canvas is created
task_completion.visual_evidence: The EdrawMax application window is visible with a blank or in-progress diagram canvas.

task_completion.description: The Kanban board title is added
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Sprint 24 - Inventory Migration' is clearly visible at the top or as the main title of the board.

task_completion.description: Four specific vertical columns are created
task_completion.visual_evidence: Four distinct vertical columns or sections are visible, labeled exactly: 'Backlog', 'In Progress', 'Code Review', and 'Done'.

task_completion.description: Tasks added to Backlog and In Progress columns with correct colors
task_completion.visual_evidence: A blue task card labeled 'User Audit Logs' is in the 'Backlog' column, and a blue task card labeled 'API Rate Limiting' is in the 'In Progress' column.

task_completion.description: Tasks added to Code Review column with correct colors
task_completion.visual_evidence: A red task card labeled 'Fix Null Pointer Exception' and a blue task card labeled 'Schema Validation' are both located in the 'Code Review' column.

task_completion.description: Task added to Done column with correct color
task_completion.visual_evidence: A green task card labeled 'Legacy DB Backup' is located in the 'Done' column.

task_completion.description: The diagram is saved as an EDDX file and exported as a PNG
task_completion.visual_evidence: Save/Export dialog boxes showing 'sprint_board.eddx' and 'sprint_board.png' being saved to '/home/ga/Documents/', or a file manager/terminal showing these files exist in the directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the EdrawMax GUI to create the board
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the EdrawMax interface with its toolbars and canvas being actively used, rather than a script being run in the terminal to generate the file.

integrity.description: The agent did not fake the board using a text editor or basic drawing tool
integrity.visual_evidence: The board must be built in EdrawMax, not mocked up by typing the layout into a text editor (like gedit or nano) or a basic paint program.

integrity.description: The agent exported the image using EdrawMax
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the EdrawMax export menu or dialog being used, rather than the agent taking a raw screenshot of the desktop and cropping it via terminal commands.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Title must be exactly 'Sprint 24 - Inventory Migration'. Columns required: 'Backlog', 'In Progress', 'Code Review', 'Done'. Task cards required: 1. 'User Audit Logs' (Blue background) in 'Backlog'. 2. 'API Rate Limiting' (Blue background) in 'In Progress'. 3. 'Fix Null Pointer Exception' (Red background) in 'Code Review'. 4. 'Schema Validation' (Blue background) in 'Code Review'. 5. 'Legacy DB Backup' (Green background) in 'Done'. Expected file paths are /home/ga/Documents/sprint_board.eddx and /home/ga/Documents/sprint_board.png.
